title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VIII. HOPE FOR LOUISIANA PATIENTS

§1300.71. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Hope for Louisiana Patients Law".

            Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
doc_text:
PART VIII.  HOPE FOR LOUISIANA PATIENTS
§1300.71.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Hope for Louisiana Patients Law".
Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
